interaction_logic.vs_fire: Living plant growth is directly opposed by fire — Athropium terrain features burn away if Fire damage is applied to the area.
interaction_logic.vs_rotweaving: Decay and rot corrupt living growth. A Rotweaver can systematically dismantle Athropium constructs over time.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: TERRAIN_MODIFY: Athropium can create or remove plant-terrain tiles on the hex grid, affecting movement costs.

weakness_logic: Any sustained Fire damage or Fire-school presence will suppress Athropium abilities. Athropium users avoid fire-heavy enemies.
notes: The strongest Athropium practitioners alive are the Talarin, dealing 20% more damage with this school than any other race.

interaction_logic.vs_darkvoid: Void energy actively drains life force — Lifewhispering heals cannot keep pace with Darkvoid drain if both are applied simultaneously.
interaction_logic.vs_rotweaving: Decay unravels healing; Lifewhispering repairs take double the Materium cost when Rotweaving is active in the same combat zone.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: HP_RESTORE: Lifewhispering heals are calculated per round and can be interrupted by Rotweaving or Darkvoid effects.

weakness_logic: Darkvoid specifically suppresses life energy, reducing Lifewhispering heal values by up to 50% while active.
notes: Northerner Clerics can reach High potency in Lifewhispering when their Conviction (faith) score is above 60.

interaction_logic.vs_darkmind: Mental intrusion tears at aura-based harmony; Darkmind illusions cause Harmony Weaves to apply to the wrong targets.
interaction_logic.vs_blood_magic: Blood-fueled rage states override Harmony buffs — the emotional violence of Blood Magic cancels the calm of Harmony Weaving.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: AURA_RADIUS: Harmony Weave effects apply to all party members within a hex range, calculated each round.

weakness_logic: Harmony Weavers require mental calm; a Blood Magic frenzy state in the party disrupts the entire Weave.
notes: Most effective when the whole party is within range. Single-target use wastes the school's potential.

interaction_logic.vs_earthen: Stone and deep earth grounds electrical charge and resists wind displacement — Earthen users are strongly resistant to Tempest.
interaction_logic.vs_geometrics: Structural geometry negates chaotic weather patterns within its field; Tempest spells lose potency against Geometric shields.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: KNOCKBACK_CALC: Tempest spells calculate displacement distance based on target's physical_hardening score.

weakness_logic: Earthen magic roots, grounds, and stabilizes. It is the natural counter to all movement-based Tempest abilities.
notes: Exceptional for breaking formation-based enemies. Weak against single heavily-armored targets.

interaction_logic.vs_tempest: Earthen magic grounds all electrical and wind effects. Earthen users are immune to Tempest knockback.
interaction_logic.vs_fire: Stone does not burn; Earthen shields negate fire spread. However sustained magical fire (Fire school) can eventually crack and melt stone.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: TERRAIN_BLOCK: Earthen can create impassable stone walls on hex tiles. Walls have HP and can be destroyed by Tempest or Fire damage.

weakness_logic: Terramancy operates at a deeper geological level — it can reshape the same stone that Earthen controls, overriding its structures.
notes: Most reliable defensive school. No single weakness except deeper earth magic.

interaction_logic.vs_earthen: Terramancy operates at a geological depth below Earthen — it reshapes what Earthen controls. Earthen walls can be sunk into the ground.
interaction_logic.vs_athropium: Root systems and plant life are torn apart when the ground itself shifts and fractures.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: EARTHQUAKE_RADIUS: Terramancy can apply stagger/prone effects to all units in a hex radius, ignoring physical_hardening.

weakness_logic: While Terramancy controls deep earth, Tempest operates in the air above it — lightning strikes can disrupt concentration required for deep geological manipulation.
notes: Rarely mastered outside of Dornak culture. The most geologically potent school in Leonoria.

interaction_logic.vs_darkvoid: Arcane energy is structured and predictable — Darkvoid's chaos directly disrupts Arcane construct patterns.
interaction_logic.vs_voidreaving: Void erasure can strip Arcane constructs from targets, negating their protective or offensive layers.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: CONSTRUCT_STABILITY: Arcane spells have a Stability rating that degrades under sustained Darkvoid pressure.

weakness_logic: Arcane structure requires order; Darkvoid is the absence of structure. Sustained Darkvoid exposure causes Arcane spells to misfire.
notes: The Saereth are the primary masters of Arcane Arts. No other race has their breadth of access.

interaction_logic.vs_umbramancy: Soul light directly burns shadow; Soulkindling attacks against Umbramancy users deal bonus damage.
interaction_logic.vs_darkmind: Mental shadow and false thoughts are burned away by genuine spiritual fire. Soulkindling grants immunity to Darkmind illusions when the caster's Conviction is above 50.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: CONVICTION_SCALE: Soulkindling spell power scales directly with the caster's current Conviction score.

weakness_logic: Void energy extinguishes inner light. Darkvoid effects reduce Soulkindling potency by up to 40%.
notes: The only school that scales with Conviction. A high-faith Northerner Cleric can reach Very High potency.

interaction_logic.vs_umbramancy: Luminance is the direct opposite of shadow. All Luminance damage against Umbramancy users is treated as Holy damage with bonus multiplier.
interaction_logic.vs_darkvoid: Pure divine light partially negates void absorption.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: UNDEAD_MULTIPLIER: Luminance deals 1.5x damage to all Undead category enemies. Abyssal enemies take 1.25x.

weakness_logic: Void absorbs light. Sufficient Darkvoid presence can extinguish Luminance fields entirely.
notes: The primary school for dealing with Undead and Abyssal threats.

interaction_logic.vs_fire: Fire melts ice and counters chill effects. Fire damage removes all Chill terrain modifications.
interaction_logic.vs_earthen: Frozen ground is stone-stable; Earth magic can break ice formations but cannot reverse cold damage.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: SLOW_STACK: Each Chill hit applies a 5% initiative reduction, stacking up to 5 times before causing Frozen status.

weakness_logic: Fire is the direct counter. Every Fire hit on a Chilled target removes one stack of Chill and deals bonus damage.
notes: Thyraen Chill damage gains +15%. The most powerful initiative-control school in Leonoria.

interaction_logic.vs_luminance: Shadow is erased by light. Umbramancy effects are suppressed in Luminance fields.
interaction_logic.vs_soulkindling: Spiritual fire burns through shadow. Soulkindling users can pierce Umbramancy concealment.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: CONCEALMENT_MOD: Umbramancy applies a miss-chance modifier to all incoming attacks when darkness is active in the combat zone.

weakness_logic: Any active Luminance field removes Umbramancy concealment bonuses and damages the shadow fabric being maintained.
notes: Absolutely requires darkness or shadow environments to reach full potency. In full daylight, potency is halved.

interaction_logic.vs_lifewhispering: Blood Magic fuels from injury; Lifewhispering heals that injury, removing the power source.
interaction_logic.vs_harmony_weaving: The emotional violence of Blood Magic frenzies cancels Harmony Weave auras.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: INJURY_SCALE: Blood Magic spell power increases by 2% for each 10% of max HP the caster has lost.

weakness_logic: Healing removes the injury-state that powers Blood Magic. A sustained Lifewhisperer can keep a Blood Mage permanently below their power threshold.
notes: A near-death Krothan Blood Mage is at their maximum power. Unusual and dangerous mechanic.

interaction_logic.vs_arcane_arts: Darkvoid disrupts structured Arcane constructs, causing misfires and pool drain.
interaction_logic.vs_luminance: Void absorbs light; Luminance fields shrink and destabilize under Darkvoid pressure.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: POOL_DRAIN: Darkvoid attacks against spellcasters drain Materium pool directly (5–15% per successful hit).

weakness_logic: Structured Arcane constructs can contain and redirect void energy. An Arcane Arts master can seal a Darkvoid breach.
notes: The most feared anti-mage school. Any caster facing a Darkvoid specialist must manage their Materium pool carefully.

interaction_logic.vs_soulkindling: Genuine spiritual conviction burns through false thoughts. Soulkindling users above 50 Conviction resist all Darkmind illusions.
interaction_logic.vs_luminance: Divine light reveals true forms; all Darkmind illusions become transparent in a Luminance field.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: CONVICTION_CHECK: Darkmind illusions require a Conviction (Tenacity) check to see through. DC scales with caster's Cognition.

weakness_logic: High-Conviction characters are naturally immune or highly resistant to mental shadow.
notes: Most effective against low-Conviction enemies. Useless against faith-based characters.

interaction_logic.vs_arcane_arts: Voidreaving can erase Arcane constructs entirely — making it appear as if the spell was never cast.
interaction_logic.vs_harmony_weaving: Void erasure strips Harmony Weave buffs from targets.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: DEBUFF_ERASE: Voidreaving can remove one active debuff from up to 2 targets per use. Ul'Karash can do this once per battle for free.

weakness_logic: Blood Magic's injury-state effects are biological, not magical — Voidreaving cannot erase them as they exist in the physical body.
notes: Primarily a support/counter school. Limited offensive utility but exceptional in clearing dangerous debuff stacks.

interaction_logic.vs_lifewhispering: Life energy resists rot; Lifewhispering slows or partially negates Rotweaving DoT ticks.
interaction_logic.vs_luminance: Divine light purifies rot; Luminance fields cleanse Rotweaving effects over time.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: DOT_STACK: Rotweaving applies Blight stacks each hit. At 5 stacks, target gains Disease status (persistent HP drain per round).

weakness_logic: Light purifies corruption. Luminance is the most efficient way to cleanse Rotweaving effects.
notes: Exceptional against targets that cannot heal (no Lifewhisperer). Against healing-capable parties it must be applied in overwhelming stacks.

interaction_logic.vs_athropium: Living plant material burns. Fire counters all Athropium terrain creation.
interaction_logic.vs_chill: Fire melts all Chill stacks and ice terrain. Direct counter.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: TERRAIN_BURN: Fire spells convert plant/ice terrain tiles to Ash tiles, which provide no cover and deal minor burn damage per round.

weakness_logic: Stone blocks fire spread. Ice and cold-temperature environments reduce Fire potency by up to 30%.
notes: The Ul'Karash are resistant to all Fire damage they receive (25% reduction) while dealing it normally.

interaction_logic.vs_dominion: Dominion can override animal bonds — summoned beasts may turn against their Communion master.
interaction_logic.vs_darkmind: False perceptions fed to bonded animals through Darkmind break the communion bond temporarily.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: ANIMAL_BOND: Summoned animals persist until destroyed or dismissed. Gruthen can use passive healing through this school without Materium cost.

weakness_logic: A Dominion caster can flip animal allegiances, weaponizing a Communion user's own allies against them.
notes: Gruthen Bestial Communion healing requires no Materium pool. Animals are always neutral toward Talarin regardless.

interaction_logic.vs_soulkindling: A burning spiritual conviction resists mental intrusion.
interaction_logic.vs_harmony_weaving: Harmony Weave buffs include mental clarity that reduces Mindwielding duration.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: CONVICTION_RESIST: All Mindwielding effects require a Conviction (Tenacity) check. High-Conviction characters may be immune.

weakness_logic: Pure spiritual fire is anathema to mental manipulation. Soulkindling users above 60 Conviction are immune to Mindwielding control effects.
notes: Zai'Keth Mindwielding gains +10% potency in open-world environments outside cities and dungeons.

interaction_logic.vs_darkmind: Emotional fire resists false thoughts — a Bloodpassion-boosted character rolls +5% against Darkmind illusions.
interaction_logic.vs_harmony_weaving: Bloodpassion rage overrides calming Harmony effects.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: RAGE_BUFF: Bloodpassion activation grants +10% martial and physical rolls for 3 rounds, then causes Exhausted status.

weakness_logic: Sustained Harmony Weaving can gradually reduce Bloodpassion rage stacks.
notes: The simplest offensive school in Leonoria — low cost, immediate impact, high exhaustion risk.

interaction_logic.vs_soulkindling: Strong conviction cannot be dominated; Soulkindling users above 50 Conviction are immune to Dominion control.
interaction_logic.vs_harmony_weaving: Harmony Weave mental clarity buffs reduce Dominion duration.
interaction_logic.engine_hook: WILL_CHECK: Dominion requires a Conviction check. On success, target acts against their faction for 1–3 rounds.

weakness_logic: Conviction is the direct counter to Dominion. High-Conviction characters resist or fully negate control attempts.
notes: The most expensive school per cast. A successful Dominion effect can swing a battle completely.
